displayText.headline: When Seconds Count, Uncertainty Is Not an Option
displayText.subheading: Critical moments demand instant, world-class intervention. Access India's top-tier emergency teams and advanced cardiac/stroke protocols immediately.
displayText.footer: Accredited Level-1 Trauma Centers across India.

style: Centered, monumental, marble platform, pure trust and prestige.
description: A central white marble pedestal holding a glowing crimson emergency beacon next to a medical stethoscope, symbolizing absolute stability and rapid response. Soft focus, premium studio lighting.
